title: 阳光下的罪恶
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\117-阳光下的罪恶-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
Miss Brutus joins a group consisting of Mr. and Mrs. Gardner, Hercule Poirot, and Miss Bustle. During their conversation, Mrs. Gardner suggests a trip to Dartmouth to visit Prince Town Prison and discusses her beliefs regarding the influence of radio waves on human sanity and a prophecy involving the pyramids. Miss Bustle mentions that someone recently threw a bottle from a hotel window, nearly hitting her, while Mr. Gardner notes he found a light purple yarn in a closet for his wife.

Appearing despondent and agitated, Patrick Redfern asks Miss Bruste to go rowing around the island with him. As they row westward past Sunlight Cliff, Patrick notices an umbrella on the cliff, which Miss Bruste identifies as belonging to Miss Dunn. Miss Bruste suspects that Patrick’s true motive for rowing is to search for Elena Marshall, who has not appeared that morning.

As they round the southern tip of Elfin Bay, a small, shaded area, Patrick spots a figure on the beach and rows toward the shore despite Miss Bruste's objections. They discover Elena Marshall lying face down in the sand with her arms spread out, wearing a white backless swimsuit and a green hat. Miss Bruste realizes the scene is unnatural because the cliffs block all sunlight from reaching this specific part of the beach, making Elena's sunbathing pose impossible. Patrick realizes Elena is dead and reacts with shock after touching her stiff body.
